subject: docs(todo): restore pattern triage decisions (task confirm item #9)
body:
The fleet-alignment task spec (Part A) required:
"For each [of HTTPS_PROXY, KEY_LESSONS, TIMER_LEAKS], decide... Record
each decision in docs/TODO.md before acting."

Commit 2202a71 recorded all three decisions. Commit 1b66ca7 removed the
block with rationale "those items described completed work; git history
is the changelog" — but that reasoning mis-applied the "git is the
changelog" rule to a spec-required persistent record. Re-running the
task's own confirm checklist caught the regression: `grep -cE
"HTTPS_PROXY|KEY_LESSONS|TIMER_LEAKS" docs/TODO.md` was returning 2,
not covering all three.

Restore the block under a new `## Pattern Triage Record (2026-04-22)`
section so its status-as-record (not active task) is obvious, and fold
the Cross-repo actions section into it — TIMER_LEAKS's upstream-PR
action was already described within the triage record, so the separate
Cross-repo actions heading was redundant and created two places for
the TIMER_LEAKS decision to drift.

All 9 task confirm criteria now pass.

Tags: documentation, fleet-alignment, regression-fix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: fleet-alignment
Semver: patch
title: restore pattern triage decisions (task confirm item #9)
